violations.text: The hand sink in the bar area was observed with a leak. Leak to be repaired. New Violation. Correct By: 03/17/2026
The door to the toilet room is not self-closing. New Violation. Correct By: 03/17/2026
The floors in the kitchen have an accumulation of old rodent droppings. The physical facilities shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. New Violation. Correct By: 03/03/2026
